title: Robot Skill Plan
description: The planner's output: a chain-of-thought rationale plus an ordered list of skill calls. The validator checks (1) JSON parses, (2) every step.skill is in schemas/skills.json, (3) args satisfy that skill's parameter schema, (4) the last step is 'done'. Sim execution then checks the goal condition.

thinking.description: Free-text reasoning produced before the plan. SDFT distills the teacher's reasoning+plan, so this field is kept (paper template asks for 'the thinking process').

plan.description: Ordered skill calls to execute. Must end with a 'done' step.

skill.description: Name of a skill defined in schemas/skills.json.

args.description: Arguments for the skill; validated against that skill's parameter schema.

examples.thinking: The red cube is on the counter and needs to go in the bin. Approach the cube, grasp it, then move to the bin and drop it in.
